acceptanceReviewed.criterion: flake.lock is refreshed with the current nixpkgs revision from `nix flake update` without changing flake input policy.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: flake.lock updates nixpkgs from `b5aa0fbd538984f6e3d201be0005b4463d8b09f8` to `65179426c83bb3f6bc14898b42ea1c6f01d374b0`; flake.nix is unchanged.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: .mise.toml pins Tuist to the latest version reported by `nix develop -c mise latest tuist`.
Evidence records the before/after pin versions and exact commands used.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-dependency-pin-refresh/commands.log records baseline pins, refresh commands, resulting pins, and validation commands.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: `nix flake check` and `nix develop -c just check` pass locally.
Hosted Linux and macOS CI pass before merge.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: This will be enforced by qd CI and merge gates before merge; local audit confirms readiness for CI promotion.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Changed files are limited to dependency pins and node evidence/reports; evidence notes explicitly avoid runtime claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a dependency/tool pin refresh; hosted CI is required before merge but no product runtime validation is claimed.
